summary: Excellent SBD capture of a scorching Playing In The Band fragment, with crystal‑clear sound and blistering jam highlights.
review: Fans rave about this short but mighty fragment – the Playing In The Band sequence is described as “hot”, “smoking” and one of the best versions ever, backed by an A+‑grade soundboard recording that delivers crisp guitars and punchy Kreutzmann cymbals.  While the set is incomplete, the musical performance shines and the technical quality makes it a must‑have for collectors.

ai_rating.rationale: Over a dozen enthusiastic 4‑5 star reviews praise both the performance (especially Playing In The Band) and the soundboard quality, leaving little doubt that the show and recording are top‑tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the sound "A+", "crisp", and note especially clear guitar tone and Kreutzmann cymbals. One comment mentions a low‑quality AUD fragment, but the SBD portion is universally praised.

standout_songs: Truckin' > Nobody's Fault But Mine > Eyes Of The World > Sugar Magnolia
show_quality.setlist_flow: Two‑set show with a jam‑heavy second set; the Playing In The Band suite is the centerpiece, leading into an extended Truckin'/Eyes Of The World/Sugar Magnolia sequence.  The fragment is short but maintains high energy throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia's guitar tone is praised as "perfect" and his improvisation in Playing In The Band is called "explores uncharted territory".
band_member_comments.Phil: Technical note about the Alembic bass channel split appears, but no explicit performance praise.
band_member_comments.Drums: Kreutzmann's cymbals are highlighted as being "right up in your face", a positive nod to the drum work.
